rulings.Case Title: HOPE H. STURGE RN VS. BOARD OF REGEISTERED NURSING,
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petitioner Hope H. Sturges, R.N.'S Order To Show Cause (Per Ex Parte Order Of 12/15/09)
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, February 4, 2010, LINE 10. Petitioner Hope H. Sturges, R.N.'S Order To Show Cause (Per Ex Parte Order Of 12/15/09) is granted. The Administrative Law Judge made a specific finding of no substantial relationship between the single conviction and the duties of a registered nurse. Therefore, the disciplinary action pursuant to B & P 2762 (b) and (c) are inconsistent with the specific finding of no nexus and the Adminstrative Law Judge's specific finding controls over the implied nexus set forth in Watson. Petitioner's request for fees denied. This is a late tentative ruling. =(302/EHG)

rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, February 4, 2010, line 11, DEFENDANTS JAY BLISS, ENKHTUYA BLISS Motion To Recover Prevailing Party Fees and Costs. Deny. The underlying Unlawful Detainer was based on the employment agreement and that agreement did not provide for fees. Late tentative =(302/EHG)
